underlying_goal: Redesign and rebuild a Honeycomb observability board for the realtime interpretation pipeline, iterating on it live via MCP tools, then codify the final result in Terraform
friction_detail: Honeycomb MCP lacked update/delete board tools forcing repeated board recreation; Terraform provider didn't support pie charts, named calculations, or formulas requiring workarounds and hardcoded query IDs.
brief_summary: User iteratively designed a Honeycomb observability board for their interpretation pipeline via MCP tools, then ported it to Terraform; mostly achieved but hit Terraform provider limitations on compound queries and needed manual UI fixups.
